sections.paragraph:
Original: יוספיה

Transliteration: yôsiphyâh

Phonetic: yo-sif-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Josiphiah = "Jehovah adds"
  1. father or ancestor of Shelomith who returned with Ezra

Origin: from active participle of H3254 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
